summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact contains 20 open PRs and reports no security-sensitive hydrated items. Because this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical is allowed, hydrated PRs are kept independently unless live preflight state is missing. No close, merge, fix, or low-signal closeout is planned: merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter, low-signal closeout is disabled, and several PRs have proof/check/review blockers.
